case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF ACTION CARD VS. JAN O RYAN et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033B(1)&(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF ACTION CARD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF ACTION CARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RYAN, JAN O $1,484.63 PRINCIPAL, $188.32 INTEREST, $268.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,940.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
